sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56961" key="kestrosfendo/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεστρο-σφενδόνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n56961.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">engine which discharges</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κέστροι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0081.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl></cit>, Liv.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0081.tlg001:42:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42.65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
